docs.title: Welcome
docs.text: Welcome to my personal site! This site is built with MkDocs Material.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: This is the home page of your new MkDocs Material site. You can edit this file at docs/index.md to customize your homepage.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
MkDocs Material comes with many great features:

  • Beautiful Design - A modern, responsive design that looks great on all devices
  • Fast Search - Built-in search functionality
  • Dark Mode - Toggle between light and dark themes
  • Code Highlighting - Syntax highlighting for code blocks
  • Easy Navigation - Intuitive navigation structure

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
To add more content:

  1. Create new .md files in the docs/ directory
  2. Update the nav section in mkdocs.yml to include them
  3. Run mkdocs serve to preview locally
  4. Deploy with mkdocs gh-deploy

Check out the About page for more information!

docs.title: About
docs.text: This is the about page. Edit this file to add information about yourself or your site.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: Add your bio, background, and interests here.

docs.title: Projects
docs.text: Share information about your projects, work, or research.

docs.title: Contact
docs.text: Add your contact information or social media links here.
